copilot_issue.snippet: The three main resume formats are chronological, functional, and combination, and each one works best in different situations depending on whether you want employers to scan a clear work history, focus on skills, or balance both approaches in the same document.

nodes.text: What are the three main resume formats?

The three main resume formats are chronological, functional, and combination, and each one works best in different situations depending on whether you want employers to scan a clear work history, focus on skills, or balance both approaches in the same document.

manifest.plain_text:
What are the three main resume formats?

The three main resume formats are chronological, functional, and combination, and each one works best in different situations depending on whether you want employers to scan a clear work history, focus on skills, or balance both approaches in the same document.
